botcomponent.description: A career-oriented AI agent that supports HK university students from admission to graduation. ① Personal Profile Management: The agent helps record and update the student's experience, awards, etc. ② Opportunity Hunting: The agent connects to the student's email inbox, suggests job opportunities and extra-curricular activities that are helpful for the student towards their career goals, by analyzing emails from career centers or job notifications. ③ CV Customization: Based on a certain JD, the agent filters relevant experiences of the students, modifies wording, and gives a customized CV for the position. ④ Auto application: The agent can draft an email with the customized CV and cover letter for a specific position. ⑤ Application Progress Monitoring: The agent monitors the student's inbox to keep track of the application progress of each application. ⑥ Analysis and Actionable Advice: The agent analyzes the student's weakness for the targeted position and suggests credit courses or LinkedIn Learning courses.
botcomponent.name: Campus Career Agent_Verizon
